options.text: Most animal and vegetable oils undergo decomposition over time in stored condition
Most animal and vegetable oils undergo decomposition over time in stored condition, when heated
Most animal and vegetable oils undergo decomposition over time in stored condition, when heated beyond a particular temperature which varies for each and every oil

explanation: Putrefaction is the process of decomposition of organic matter, such as animal and vegetable oils, which can lead to the release of toxic or flammable gases when stored for long periods.
